docs.title: Bluewater Documentation Site
docs.text:
This folder contains the configuration and assets needed to publish Bluewater’s documentation as a website using GitHub Pages.

  • Site generator: MkDocs, Docusaurus, or static site builder of your choice.
  • Content: Pulled from /architecture/, /technical/, and optionally /phpdoc/.
  • Configuration: mkdocs.yml (for MkDocs), docusaurus.config.js (for Docusaurus), etc.

Deployment: The site is published automatically via GitHub Actions when content changes are merged into main.

See also: SYNC_PROCESS.md for details on how source docs are kept up to date.

This site and its content are licensed under the CC BY 4.0 License.

Last updated: {{DATE}}
